hǎo
1	good; fine; nice

好人 ☕

hǎorén

a nice person

天气真好。 ☕

Tiānqì zhēn hǎo.

The weather's really nice.

祖国的好儿子 ☕

Zǔguó de hǎo érzi

a worthy (or fine) son of our country

庄稼长得真好。 ☕

Zhuāngjia zhǎng de zhēn hǎo.

The crops are doing well.

2	friendly; kind

好朋友 ☕

Hǎo péngyou

a good (or great) friend

他们对我真好。 ☕

Tāmen duì wǒ zhēn hǎo.

They are really kind to me.

这两个孩子又好了。 ☕

Zhè liǎng ge háizi yòu hǎo le.

The two children are friends again.

3	be in good health; get well

我的病好了。 ☕

Wǒ de bìng hǎo le.

I'm well (or all right) now.

你好哇! ☕

Nǐ hǎo wa!

How are you?

4	be ready; done

饭好了。 ☕

Fàn hǎo le.

The food (or rice) is ready.

5	(used after verbs to indicate finishing or finishing satisfactorily)

这件事他做不好。 ☕

Zhè jiàn shì tā zuò bù hǎo.

He can't do that job well.

我把他的病治好了。 ☕

Wǒ bǎ tā de bìng zhì hǎo le.

I cured his illness.

坐好吧, 要开会了。 ☕

Zuò hǎo ba, yào kāihuì le.

Take your seats, please. The meeting is going to begin.

6	ADVERB
(used before verbs) be good to; be easy to

好喝 ☕

hǎohē

good to drink

这个问题好回答。 ☕

Zhège wèntí hǎo huídá.

This question is easy to answer.

这本书可不好买。 ☕

Zhè běn shū kě bù hǎo mǎi.

This book is not easily available.

暖瓶放在这儿好拿。 ☕

Nuǎnpíng fàng zài zhèr hǎo ná.

It's handy to have the thermos here.

7	INTERJECTION
(used at the beginning of a sentence or clause, to express agreement, disapproval, surprise, etc.)

好, 就这么办。 ☕

Hǎo, jiù zhème bàn.

O.K. , it's settled.

好了, 不要再说了。 ☕

Hǎo le, bùyào zài shuō le.

All right, no need to say any more.

好, 这下可麻烦了。 ☕

Hǎo, zhè xià kě máfan le.

Well, we're in for trouble now.

好!那得多少钱! ☕

Hǎo! Nà dé duōshao qián!

Gosh! How much money will that cost!

我一看, 好, 都走了。 ☕

Wǒ yī kàn,  hǎo, dōu zǒu le.

I took a look, gosh, everybody has left.

8	ADVERB
the better to; in order to; so that

今儿早点睡, 明儿好早起赶火车。 ☕

Jīnr zǎodiǎn shuì, míngr hǎo zǎoqǐ gǎn huǒchē.

Let's turn in early, so as to get up early tomorrow to catch the train.

把她的地址告诉我, 我好找她。 ☕

Bǎ tā de dìzhǐ gàosu wǒ, wǒ hǎo zhǎo tā.

Tell me her address so that I can go and see her.

9	ADVERB
(used before adjectives with exclamatory force) very; quite; so

今天好冷。 ☕

Jīntiān hǎo lěng.

Today is quite cold.

你好大胆子。 ☕

Nǐ hǎo dà dǎnzi.

You are so daring.

好大的工程! ☕

Hǎo dà de gōngchéng!

What a huge project!

10	ADVERB
(used before adjectives in the same way as 多) to what extent; how

火车站离这儿好远？ ☕

Huǒchēzhàn lí zhèr hǎo yuǎn？

How far is the railway station from here?

11	ADVERB
(used before indefinite numbers) quite a few

好几个 ☕

hǎojǐgè

quite a few

好几天 ☕

hǎojǐtiān

quite a few days

好半天 ☕

hǎobàntiān

quite a while

12	DIALECT
may; can; should

我好进来吗？ ☕

Wǒ hǎo jìnlai ma？

May I come in?

时间不早了, 你好走了。 ☕

Shíjiān bù zǎo le, nǐhǎo zǒu le.

It's getting late. You ought to get going.
